title: React Slideout Modal Drawer

statement.markdown:
## React Slideout Modal Drawer Component

Implement a slide-out modal Drawer drawer layout opening from the right side of the viewport.

### Requirements:
1. **Slide Transition**: The drawer panel must slide in from the right edge smoothly, and slide back out on hide.
2. **Backdrop Blur**: Render a backdrop overlay with custom background blurs that closes the drawer when clicked.
3. **Esc Key Dismissal**: Listens to keydown keyboard events and closes the drawer when **Escape** is pressed.
4. **Scroll Lock**: Locking body scroll when active to prevent secondary page navigation loops.

constraints: Must support mobile responsive layout coordinates

gradingCriteria.description: Verify that the interactive props, callbacks, and element structures work cleanly.
Verify state structure designs and clean Tailwind CSS layouts.
